text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While walking around campus on my break, I see
Sakura Chiyono O in the shade.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Who's that over there? It looks like Spe
aaand...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: M-Maruzen!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hey, don'tcha just think it's a great day for a drive? It'll be a great way to chillax! ♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
A drive?! Well, as long as we follow the traffic
laws, sure!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...A ride with Maruzen. Wouldn't that be nice...
choice_data_list: Why not ask to go along?
Why not ask to go along?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Eeek!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ah, um, hello. No, I'm... fine.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...Just fine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curious about why she seems so downtrodden, I
ask her to explain.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: The truth is, I...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I get motion sick!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Chiyo! ♪ Wanna go for a drive to the
beach?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Y-you're okay with me coming?! I'd love to!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: (I'm sure I'll be fine. It's just a little ways away...)

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Let's floor it, babyyy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: VROOOOOM!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
...It was terrible. The motion sickness hit me like a
truck.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I'm sure you can guess what happened next...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
She hasn't invited me on a drive since. I'm sure
she's just being considerate, but it still sucks...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
So it only makes sense that she'd invite other
people instead of me. Besides, I don't want to be
a bother.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I... I... Well, I mean...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I... Well, the truth is that I...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I really want to go for a drive with Maruzen! I miss her so much!
choice_data_list:
Why don't you work on overcoming your motion
sickness?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Sniff... I did try to get used to riding different vehicles.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But when I think about what happened, I get cold
feet and can't go through with it.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
And every time I find myself acting like that, I
feel like I'm drifting further and further away from
Maruzen...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry. I shouldn't think like this.
choice_data_list:
Maybe you could do some research before you
try again?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Research? ...Do you mean, like, looking into what
causes my motion sickness?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, you're right... Depending on the cause, there
might be more suitable methods I can use to
overcome it.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
And it feels much better to do that than to simply
sulk and envy others.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
You know what they say! "Know the soil before
you plant the flowers!"

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Thank you! I'll try it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It won't be easy for Sakura Chiyono O to get over
her nausea, but she's taking the first step towards
progress.
